title: habenaria procera
intro: Habenaria procera, commonly known as the tall yellow orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid found in the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Habenaria procera include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antidiabetic properties. The herbal preparations of Habenaria procera typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves to create teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
